response.justification: Bogdan has extensive full-stack experience and a strong track record in tooling, testing, and open-source contributions, but his resume lacks clear, recent, or deep involvement with Java/Kotlin, Spring, JVM internals, or enterprise IDE tooling — critical for this role. His Java exposure appears limited to past embedded/robotics projects, with no evidence of modern JVM tooling or IDE development.
strengths: Proven experience in developer tooling and open-source IDE-like projects (e.g., GISCollective, Fluent-Asserts)
Strong testing culture and TDD expertise across multiple languages and teams
Demonstrated ability to work on complex, performance-critical systems and contribute to CI/CD infrastructure
concerns: Minimal evidence of recent or deep Java/Kotlin enterprise development beyond early-career roles
No mention of Spring, Hibernate, Quarkus, or application server integration in recent work
Primary modern tech stack is TypeScript/Node.js/DLang, with no clear focus on IDE internals or JVM tooling
